result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 9:     AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%%'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-10'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(ownerid, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-10'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(new_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
), agent_cases AS (
  SELECT
    ha.agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT oc.case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN owner_changes oc
    ON REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(oc.old_owner,''), '^#', '') = ha.agent_id
    OR REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(oc.new_owner,''), '^#', '') = ha.agent_id
  GROUP BY ha.agent_id
), base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(ownerid, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS initial_cases
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-10'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_more0 AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ac.agent_id, bc.agent_id) AS agent_id,
    COALESCE(bc.initial_cases,0) + COALESCE(ac.cases_handled,0) AS handled_case_count
  FROM agent_cases ac
  FULL OUTER JOIN base_cases bc
    ON ac.agent_id = bc.agent_id
  WHERE COALESCE(bc.initial_cases,0) + COALESCE(ac.cases_handled,0) > 0
)
SELECT hm.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_more0 hm
LEFT JOIN transfers t
  ON t.agent_id = hm.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, hm.handled_case_count DESC, hm.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-10'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(ownerid, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-10'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(old_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(new_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
), agent_cases AS (
  SELECT
    ha.agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT oc.case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN owner_changes oc
    ON REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(oc.old_owner,''), '^#', '') = ha.agent_id
    OR REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(oc.new_owner,''), '^#', '') = ha.agent_id
  GROUP BY ha.agent_id
), base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(ownerid, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS initial_cases
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-10'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_more0 AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ac.agent_id, bc.agent_id) AS agent_id,
    COALESCE(bc.initial_cases,0) + COALESCE(ac.cases_handled,0) AS handled_case_count
  FROM agent_cases ac
  FULL OUTER JOIN base_cases bc
    ON ac.agent_id = bc.agent_id
  WHERE COALESCE(bc.initial_cases,0) + COALESCE(ac.cases_handled,0) > 0
)
SELECT hm.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_more0 hm
LEFT JOIN transfers t
  ON t.agent_id = hm.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, hm.handled_case_count DESC, hm.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(COALESCE(old_owner,'')), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(COALESCE(old_owner,'')), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(COALESCE(new_owner,'')), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
), agent_cases AS (
  SELECT
    ha.agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT oc.case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN owner_changes oc
    ON REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(COALESCE(oc.old_owner,'')), '^#', '') = ha.agent_id
    OR REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(COALESCE(oc.new_owner,'')), '^#', '') = ha.agent_id
  GROUP BY ha.agent_id
), base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS initial_cases
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_more0 AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ac.agent_id, bc.agent_id) AS agent_id,
    COALESCE(bc.initial_cases,0) + COALESCE(ac.cases_handled,0) AS handled_case_count
  FROM agent_cases ac
  FULL OUTER JOIN base_cases bc
    ON ac.agent_id = bc.agent_id
  WHERE COALESCE(bc.initial_cases,0) + COALESCE(ac.cases_handled,0) > 0
)
SELECT hm.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_more0 hm
LEFT JOIN transfers t
  ON t.agent_id = hm.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, hm.handled_case_count DESC, hm.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
